title: Hot Wheels: World's Best Driver
summary: Hot Wheels World's Best Driver is a 2013 vehicular sports-racing video game developed by Firebrand Games and published by Warner Bros Interactive. It was released on the Xbox 360, PlayStation 3, Nintendo 3DS, Wii U, and PC on September 17, 2013.

title: K.I.T. Racing
summary:
right|250px
K.I.T. Racing is an acronym for Kinetic Interactive Technology, a customizable line of Hot Wheels vehicles released in 2002. The series was produced by Mattel under a licensing agreement with the Japanese toy manufacturer TOMY Company, Ltd.

title: Micro Hot Wheels
